title: Add quality and fix loop models
description: Add QualityReport, QualityIssue, QualitySummary, FixPlan, FixAction, and FixLoopRecord models with statuses pass/fixed/warning/fail/unsupported and fix loop states.
acceptance_criteria: Models serialize issue status, profile rule refs, locations, recommendations, summary counts, fix actions, confirmation flags, and lineage ids.
review_initial_requirements: quality-reporting: Structured quality report; agent-fix-planning: Structured fix plan; quality-fix-loop: Fix loop lineage
review_regression_requirements: Existing FileRecord, JobRecord, ProfileExtractionRecord, and FormatProfile models remain compatible.
notes: StageC:TDD red import failure confirmed; validation: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_quality_reports.py -q -> 4 passed; cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 74 passed, 1 warning.

title: Persist quality reports and fix loops
description: Extend JsonMetadataRepository with add/get/list/update helpers for quality_reports and quality_fix_loops, defaulting legacy metadata collections to empty.
acceptance_criteria: Quality reports and fix loop records persist across reloads; legacy metadata without new keys still loads.
review_initial_requirements: quality-reporting: Structured quality report; quality-fix-loop: Fix loop lineage
review_regression_requirements: Existing repository tests for files/jobs/profiles/extractions continue passing.
notes: StageC:TDD red repository method AttributeError confirmed; validation: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_quality_reports.py -q -> 6 passed; cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 76 passed, 1 warning.

title: Test report grouping and lineage persistence
description: Add tests for quality summary grouping counts, unsupported visibility, failed issue serialization, and fix loop original/new report lineage.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover pass/fixed/warning/fail/unsupported counts and preserve original report references in fix loop records.
review_initial_requirements: quality-reporting: Quality status classification; quality-fix-loop: Fix loop lineage
notes: StageC:TDD red missing issues_by_status confirmed; validation: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_quality_reports.py -q -> 7 passed; cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 77 passed, 1 warning.

title: Implement DOCX quality inspection
description: Implement DOCX quality report service checks for profile margins, body style, headings, table borders, captions, raw LaTeX residue, and page-number unsupported status.
acceptance_criteria: DOCX checks produce pass/warning/fail/unsupported issues with rule refs, locations, and suggested actions.
review_regression_requirements: Existing document formatter/parser tests continue passing.
notes: StageC:TDD red missing app.quality confirmed; validation: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_quality_reports.py -q -> 9 passed; cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 79 passed, 1 warning.

title: Implement PDF quality inspection
description: Implement PDF quality checks for file openability, page count > 0, text extractability, and blank-page warning/unsupported diagnostics.
acceptance_criteria: Readable PDF with text passes basic checks; unreadable/missing/empty-text PDF creates fail or unsupported issues.
review_regression_requirements: DOCX-only reports remain valid when no PDF output exists.

title: Test quality report generation statuses
description: Add tests for pass, warning, fail, and unsupported report generation from crafted DOCX/PDF-like fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: Quality service tests cover supported pass checks, margin/style failures, raw LaTeX warning/fail, page-number unsupported, and PDF diagnostics.

title: Implement deterministic explanations and whitelisted fix plans
description: Implement fix planning service that explains warning/fail/unsupported issues, marks manual-review items, and validates whitelisted actions only.
acceptance_criteria: Known supported issues get deterministic explanations and fix actions with requires_user_confirmation=true; unsupported/semantic issues require manual review.
review_initial_requirements: agent-fix-planning: Agent issue explanation; Structured fix plan; Deterministic fallback explanations

title: Test fix-plan safety validation
description: Add tests for supported actions, unsafe/unknown actions, semantic edits, missing issue targets, manual-review items, and missing LLM fallback.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid or unsafe plans are rejected; deterministic fallback works without LLM configuration.
review_initial_requirements: agent-fix-planning: Reject unsafe fix action; LLM unavailable fallback
review_regression_requirements: Existing Agent extraction tests remain green.

title: Add quality report creation and retrieval APIs
description: Add POST /api/quality-reports and GET /api/quality-reports/{report_id} for formatted output ids/profile refs.
acceptance_criteria: API creates/retrieves reports with summary counts and grouped issues; missing files/profiles return readable errors.

title: Add fix-plan and fix-loop APIs
description: Add API endpoints to create fix plans from reports and confirm fix loops with selected actions.
acceptance_criteria: Unconfirmed plans do not create fix jobs; confirmed valid plans create lineage records with original report id and selected actions.
review_initial_requirements: quality-fix-loop: User-confirmed fix execution; agent-fix-planning: Structured fix plan

title: Add quality API tests
description: Add API tests for report creation/retrieval, grouped counts, fix-plan validation, missing report/file/profile errors, and confirmation gating.
acceptance_criteria: API tests cover quality report and fix loop endpoint scenarios.

title: Add frontend quality API types
description: Extend frontend API client with quality report, issue, fix plan, fix loop types and create/get methods.
acceptance_criteria: npm build passes and frontend types cover summary, grouped issues, explanations, actions, and lineage ids.
review_initial_requirements: quality-fix-loop: Frontend report and fix-loop visibility
review_regression_requirements: Existing API client types remain compatible.

title: Add grouped quality report panel
description: Add frontend panel that displays grouped pass/fixed/warning/fail/unsupported counts, issue details, and remaining issue summary without claiming all compliant when unresolved issues exist.
acceptance_criteria: Quality panel shows grouped report and remaining warning/fail/unsupported summary.
review_initial_requirements: quality-reporting: Quality report does not imply all compliant; quality-fix-loop frontend scenarios

title: Add fix-plan review and confirmation controls
description: Add frontend controls to request/display fix plans, show explanations/actions/manual review, and confirm selected valid actions.
acceptance_criteria: Fix controls require user action before confirmation and display lineage state after creation.
review_regression_requirements: No automatic fix execution is implied by viewing a report.

title: Update quality and fix-loop documentation
description: Update README/backend/frontend docs for quality report scope, Agent fix safety, unsupported handling, no all-compliant misreporting, and verification commands.
acceptance_criteria: Docs describe report statuses, DOCX/PDF checks, whitelisted fix actions, user confirmation, and limitations.
review_regression_requirements: Existing docx engine and Agent extraction docs remain accurate.

title: Run quality fix loop final verification
description: Run OpenSpec strict validation, backend tests, frontend build, quality smoke tests, and hardcoded secret scan.
acceptance_criteria: openspec validate passes; backend tests pass; frontend build passes; quality smoke confirms report statuses; secret scan has no hardcoded keys.
